gist.headline: A tidier hive for models
gist.blurb: We've completely redesigned the models and pricing table to be sleeker, faster, and easier to read. Say goodbye to scroll-jumps and hello to crisp new tabs and colorful badges!
gist.summary: Redesigned the pricing and models table, replacing accordions with a clean tabbed interface and unifying badge designs for better readability.
gist.impact: Users will experience a smoother, jump-free navigation when browsing available models, with clearer visual indicators for new, alpha, and paid options.
gist.visual_concept: Organizing a messy list into neat, colorful tabs. Polly the bee acting as an archivist or organizer, sorting glowing pixel-art cards (representing models) into neat, color-coded wooden bins or a retro filing system.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, carefully organizing glowing teal and purple cards into neat wooden sorting bins. A retro computer monitor nearby displays a clean, colorful tabbed interface. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
